# Eligible Items & Cycles

Subscriptions are available for consumable-products such as filters and cleaning supplies. Delivery cycles are limited to 30, 60, or 90 days for these subscriptions and their delivery-cycles.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#eligible-items-cycles]
